title: cassia bicapsularis var. indecora
intro: Cassia bicapsularis var. indecora, also known as the Lesser Cassia or False Senna, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cassia bicapsularis var. indecora include treating digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its potential in reducing fever and relieving symptoms of respiratory infections. Cassia bicapsularis var. indecora is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
